case_title: HERBERT GIN VS. LUZ DE VERANO CERVANTES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2010 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY GIN, HERBERT AS TO DEFENDANT CERVANTES, LUZ DE VERANO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-22-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($55.00) SERVED SEP-07-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CERVANTES, LUZ DE VERANO
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CERVANTES, LUZ DE VERANO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-22-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-22-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GIN, HERBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CERVANTES, LUZ DE VERANO $3,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,880.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
